Cluster_0: Groww is one of the best trading and investing apps I’ve used. The interface is clean, beginner-friendly, and very smooth to navigate. Opening stocks, mutual funds, SIPs, and even F&O trading is simple and fast. I also like how transparent the app feels with charges and portfolio tracking. Customer support and updates have improved a lot too. Great app for both beginners and experienced investors. Highly recommended!
This app is good for mutual funds but very bad for stocks. Grow app charges Rs 400 for a profit of Rs 500. The most costlly grow app for stock.

I have been using the Groww app for a while now, and it has made investing incredibly simple. The user interface is clean, smooth, and very easy to navigate, even for beginners. Tracking my mutual funds and stocks is seamless. Highly recommended for anyone looking to start their investment journey!

GROWW: THE WONDER BOX Very Simple but Excellent app for trading in stocks, MF etc Excellent user friendly and superfast UI. Buy, Sell orders executed in seconds with DDPI Caution shown during buy orders is highly helpful. We can get lot of information of a stock including overview, technicals, news/ latest news etc., Graphs including smaller graphs are guiding pathways, help us take informed decisions.
